purpose: Shared cross-language preview fixture for the minimum native runtime loop. It is intentionally small and must be expanded before any non-Python runtime can claim stable parity.

required_scenarios.name: durable_run_evidence_replay
required_scenarios.description: Create a run, execute one leased step, commit a state patch, export evidence, and replay without side effects.

required_scenarios.name: tool_ledger_idempotent_retry
required_scenarios.description: A side-effect tool succeeds, the agent crashes or retries, and the next attempt reuses the Tool Ledger response instead of executing the tool again.

required_scenarios.name: lease_recovery_fences_stale_worker
required_scenarios.description: An expired lease is recovered and the previous owner cannot commit state with the old fencing token.

required_scenarios.name: cancellation_fences_worker
required_scenarios.description: A cancelled run fences a worker that still holds a previous lease token.
